name: genslides
description: HTML-mockup-first → pptxgenjs → validate workflow for crafting on-brand consulting / bid / executive slides one page at a time. Four built-in Big-Four consulting styles (KPMG default · Deloitte · PwC · EY), switchable in config/theme.json. Composes the pptx and frontend-design skills; enforces mode-alignment, HTML sign-off, OOXML validation, and fresh-eyes QA gates.
